creator: rainer@ultra-secure.de
text:
The nanobsd documentation:
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/nanobsd/index.html
linked from here:
https://www.freebsd.org/docs/books.html

still contains references to pkg_add.
As such, it's probably at least partly outdated.

Could someone with knowledge of nanobsd update it?
